source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Polonium-211 $({ }_{84}^{211} \mathrm{Po})$ decays by alpha emission to form a stable isotope of lead $(\mathrm{Pb})$. The variation with time $t$ of the number of unstable nuclei $N$ in a sample of polonium-211 is shown in Fig. 9.1. At time $t=0$, the sample contains only polonium-211. Use Fig. 9.1 to determine the decay constant $\lambda$ of polonium-211. Give a unit with your answer.

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和两张图像资产齐全，且资产登记通过、无明显问题。
图像依赖度高但对应图像资源完整，核心语义支撑充分。
答案为短文本且可验证性分数较高，适合进入候选池。
